'''joyagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keloidal|keloidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keloidal|keloidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| joyagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:joyagithi|joyagithi]] || [[word:joyagiji|joyagiji]] || [[word:joyagishi|joyagishi]] || [[word:joyagiki|joyagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:joyaguthuthu|joyaguthuthu]] || [[word:joyagujuju|joyagujuju]] || [[word:joyagushushu|joyagushushu]] || [[word:joyagukuku|joyagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:joyaguthu|joyaguthu]] || [[word:joyaguju|joyaguju]] || [[word:joyagushu|joyagushu]] || [[word:joyaguku|joyaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:joyagufthuf|joyagufthuf]] || [[word:joyagufjuf|joyagufjuf]] || [[word:joyagufshuf|joyagufshuf]] || [[word:joyagufkuf|joyagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:joyagethe|joyagethe]] || [[word:joyageje|joyageje]] || [[word:joyageshe|joyageshe]] || [[word:joyageke|joyageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:joyagothotho|joyagothotho]] || [[word:joyagojojo|joyagojojo]] || [[word:joyagoshosho|joyagoshosho]] || [[word:joyagokoko|joyagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:joyagotho|joyagotho]] || [[word:joyagojo|joyagojo]] || [[word:joyagosho|joyagosho]] || [[word:joyagoko|joyagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:joyagofthof|joyagofthof]] || [[word:joyagofjof|joyagofjof]] || [[word:joyagofshof|joyagofshof]] || [[word:joyagofkof|joyagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfthÃŸf|joyagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfjÃŸf|joyagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfshÃŸf|joyagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfkÃŸf|joyagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|joyagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|joyagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|joyagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|joyagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfthÃŸf|joyagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfjÃŸf|joyagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfshÃŸf|joyagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfkÃŸf|joyagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfthÃŸf|joyagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfjÃŸf|joyagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfshÃŸf|joyagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joyagÃŸfkÃŸf|joyagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:joyagÃḊthÃḊ|joyagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:joyagÃḊjÃḊ|joyagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:joyagÃḊshÃḊ|joyagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:joyagÃḊkÃḊ|joyagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:joyagathatha|joyagathatha]] || [[word:joyagajaja|joyagajaja]] || [[word:joyagashasha|joyagashasha]] || [[word:joyagakaka|joyagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:joyagatha|joyagatha]] || [[word:joyagaja|joyagaja]] || [[word:joyagasha|joyagasha]] || [[word:joyagaka|joyagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:joyagafthaf|joyagafthaf]] || [[word:joyagafjaf|joyagafjaf]] || [[word:joyagafshaf|joyagafshaf]] || [[word:joyagafkaf|joyagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:joyagasha|joyagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:joyagshÃḋsha|joyagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:joyagrosha|joyagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:joyagmusha|joyagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:joyagyasha|joyagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojoyagnkshÃḋsha|gojoyagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojoyagnkrosha|gojoyagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojoyagnkmusha|gojoyagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojoyagnkyasha|gojoyagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:joyayagasha|joyayagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:joyayagshÃḋsha|joyayagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:joyayagrosha|joyayagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:joyayagmusha|joyayagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:joyayagyasha|joyayagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojoyayagnkshÃḋsha|gojoyayagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojoyayagnkrosha|gojoyayagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojoyayagnkmusha|gojoyayagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojoyayagnkyasha|gojoyayagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jeyÃḊgasha|jeyÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jeyÃḊgshÃḋsha|jeyÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jeyÃḊgrosha|jeyÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jeyÃḊgmusha|jeyÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jeyÃḊgyasha|jeyÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojeyÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|gojeyÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojeyÃḊgnkrosha|gojeyÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojeyÃḊgnkmusha|gojeyÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojeyÃḊgnkyasha|gojeyÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:joyfagasha|joyfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:joyfagshÃḋsha|joyfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:joyfagrosha|joyfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:joyfagmusha|joyfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:joyfagyasha|joyfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojoyfagnkshÃḋsha|gojoyfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojoyfagnkrosha|gojoyfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojoyfagnkmusha|gojoyfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojoyfagnkyasha|gojoyfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
